name: Shoreline
description_short: Shoreline Community College is a public two-year college in Washington offering 100+ academic programs with financial aid available to 75% of students.
description_long: Shoreline Community College is a public community college located near Seattle, Washington, serving the regional higher education market since its establishment. The institution offers over 100 degree and certificate options across seven major program areas including Business & Management, Healthcare & Wellness, Industrial Technology, Languages & Communication, STEM, Social Sciences & Public Service, and Visual & Performing Arts, along with College Readiness and ESL programs. The college distinguishes itself through small class sizes, over 20 years of online learning experience, on-campus housing options, and a commitment to student diversity and support services. Notably, 75% of students receive financial aid covering tuition, fees, food, housing, and transportation costs. The institution emphasizes comprehensive student support through counseling services, office hours, faculty mentoring, and campus programs celebrating diverse communities. However, as a community college rather than a consumer finance company, Shoreline does not offer loans, credit products, or financial services typical of the payday-alternatives or consumer finance sectors. The miscategorization in CreditDoc's system appears to stem from a data entry error rather than any legitimate connection to alternative lending or financial products.
services: Associate degree programs across 7 major academic disciplines
Online learning and distance education courses
Financial aid and tuition assistance programs
Spring and summer quarter enrollment options
pros: 75% of students receive financial aid assistance with tuition, fees, food, housing, and transportation
Small class sizes provide personalized learning environments
Over 20 years of established online learning infrastructure
100+ academic program options across diverse fields
Located conveniently close to Seattle metropolitan area
Strong emphasis on student support services and counseling
cons: Not a consumer finance company—does not offer loans or financial products
Website miscategorization creates false expectation of payday-alternative services
No emergency cash, short-term lending, or credit services available
Limited to traditional community college educational services only
best_for: High school graduates seeking affordable higher education near Seattle
Working adults pursuing online or part-time degree completion
Students needing financial aid and comprehensive support services
diagnosis: Shoreline Community College is fundamentally a public educational institution, not a consumer finance or payday-alternative lender. This profile should be removed from CreditDoc's finance directory as it serves no function in the consumer lending landscape and misleads users seeking actual financial products or services.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
